headline: The war on ‘woke science’ comes for space research
summary: Trump administration's OMB proposal threatens US science. It grants political appointees control over grant funding. This could impact future space research and NASA.

headline: God Of War TV series is recasting Kratos
summary: Amazon's God Of War TV show faces a major recasting snag. Original lead actor Ryan Hurst is out due to an on-set injury. The production is now searching for a new Kratos.

headline: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
summary: Fortnite will introduce AI-powered characters with unique voices. Creators can publish experiences using these new AI NPCs starting July 30th. Epic Games developed 36 consistent AI personas for players to utilize.

headline: Samsung’s 55-inch Frame art TV is $200 cheaper than usual
summary: Samsung's 55-inch Frame TV is currently on sale for $200 off. This unique 4K TV doubles as a framed art display when not in use. It features bezels and a matte finish to mimic real artwork.

headline: GTA 6 Predicted to Make Up to $5.2 Billion in Sales by End of Launch Week After Securing an Estimated $260 Million via Preorders
summary: GTA 6 is projected to hit $5.2 billion in sales by its launch week's end. Preorders already secured an estimated $260 million. Analysts call its preorder campaign the strongest ever seen.

headline: 'Wrong (again)' — Infinity Ward Fires Back at Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Gunny AI Chatbot Claim
summary: Infinity Ward denies claims about an AI chatbot in Modern Warfare 4's Gunsmith. The developer firmly refutes the "Gunny AI Chatbot" allegations. They stated the claims were "wrong (again)" regarding the new feature.

headline: MTG Star Trek Commander Deck Bundle Is Much Cheaper Than Buying Each Precon Deck Individually
summary: Preorders are live for MTG's Star Trek Commander decks. Buying the bundle saves $75 compared to individual deck purchases. This offer is highlighted as better value than previous Marvel Super Hero Decks.

headline: Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse Might Make the Long Wait for a New 2D Castlevania Worth It | IGN Preview
summary: IGN's preview suggests Castlevania: Belmont's Curse meets high expectations. Developed by Evil Empire, it revives the 2D Castlevania series. Early gameplay hours indicate it lives up to its legendary predecessors.

headline: Five headaches Andy Burnham will have to deal with as PM
summary: Andy Burnham faces significant challenges if he becomes UK Prime Minister. Issues include complex matters like defence spending. He also needs to address critical housing problems.

headline: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
summary: China has criticized the UK government's nationalization of British Steel. The UK cites safeguarding a "vital national capability" as the reason. This move has sparked international geopolitical tension.

headline: The financial winners and losers from the World Cup
summary: The 2026 World Cup is generating substantial off-field revenue. An analysis reveals key financial winners and losers from the tournament. Big money is being made, but not everyone is profiting.

headline: US launches new strikes as Iran says civilian infrastructure hit
summary: The US has conducted new strikes, intensifying regional tensions. Iran claims these strikes hit civilian infrastructure. A US ship boarded another in the Strait of Hormuz during the escalation.
